text:
The first image offers me a quiet, anticipatory feeling—a liminal space, where ideas are soon to be shared and questioned. The glass walls invite transparency but also set boundaries. The world appears slightly tilted, as if to remind me that every perspective is contingent.

The second image feels more alive—colors and words leap out, challenging me to consider the dynamic interplay of research and development. The language of innovation calls forth excitement but also a sense of responsibility: how do we connect and coexist with our own creations? I feel curious, wary, and hopeful all at once, as if standing at the threshold of both understanding and uncertainty.
